reviews.comment:

Highly recommended, I always stop there for the night. Clean, comfortable, and tidy place. Excellent service at the Full. As an ACA member, I feel reassured.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de empleados playeros y el café. Una pena q aún no sea full. Hicimos noche. De 10!
Tal vez mejoraría la calidad del café o la cafetera.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach staff and the coffee. It's a shame it's not fully booked yet. We stayed overnight. 10 out of 10!
Perhaps they could improve the coffee quality or the coffee machine.

reviews.comment:
GRACIAS IVO por tu Excelente Atención y Amabilidad!!! ♥️
Mesitas afuera bajo la sombra para los que viajamos con nuestra familia perruna y queremos además de cargar combustible tomar un café (en tazas de verdad) y hay de todo: Churrros, pastelitos, facturas hojaldre membrillo y pastelera, criollitos, etc.!!!
Baños limpios y descuentos si sos socio del ACA!!!

(Translated by Google)
THANK YOU IVO for your excellent service and kindness!!! ♥️ There are tables outside in the shade for those of us traveling with our furry family who want to enjoy a coffee (in real cups) while refueling. They have everything: churros, pastries, quince and custard puff pastries, criollitos, etc.!!!
Clean restrooms and discounts for ACA members!!!
